title: Handoffs Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger handoffs foundations judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Handoffs Foundations is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Handoffs Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good handoffs foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Handoffs Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
